name: Charles Offdensen
description:
This man makes me go feral!! Why is he so hot! I know I skipped Skwisgaar, and Nathan but they're coming eventually I had to make this one for Charles. Anyways here's an idea I had randomly for Charles enjoy!

Dethklok has forgotten about Charles's birthday again, not that he cares, because he's grown used to this treatment over the years, however, he's surprised when the newest member of the band remembered the simplest thing, and yet the newest member of Dethklok catches him off guard..
creator: Sauls_assistant
